title: copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip
predecessor: M33-T8 shipped 2026-04-16, commit f245821 (canned copilot provider seam; 3 files +298/-12; 1094 → 1099 unit tests, 0 lint errors, 24 warnings steady, typecheck clean across 6 packages).
goal: End-to-end Playwright spec exercising the copilot analyzer loop against the T8 canned provider seam. Boot Electron in NODE_ENV=test, configure the analyzer via copilot.configure / settings.setCopilot, seed events through fixtures (ticket create + close + meeting create+end) to exercise the T3 event-window warm-start hydration, call copilot.tick(companyId) through a test-only IPC helper (or direct analyzer tick via a __test__ channel), assert ≥1 insight surfaces via copilot.insights, dismiss one insight and assert dismissed_at + the copilot.dismissed audit row, issue copilot.ask to run the agentic loop through system-copilot (sharing M31's step-stream harness via useAgentStepStream), assert a grounded answer step lands on the system-copilot thread, and assert BOTH invariants hold throughout: (1) the destructive-confirmation gate NEVER fires (copilot analysis + ask are advisory; write-side gate must stay absent), (2) the sidenav shows TWO distinct system threads (system-agent + system-copilot) distinguishable by `name`. Unit tests 0 delta; E2E spec count 8 → 9 (+1). Register per-spec canned fixtures through T8's addCopilotFixture + addWriteSideFixture-style entries (via test-agentic-tools.ts ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY seam for the ask path) without mutating either frozen table at module-load time. Pattern budget: one subagent pass for the canned-script generation (per M31 T8 + M32 T8 handoff note); coordinator does git-diff verification + biome spot-check + atomic commit.
acceptance: NEW apps/desktop/e2e/copilot-service.spec.ts — one or two Playwright cases launching a real Electron instance against out/main/index.js with NODE_ENV=test and a throwaway --user-data-dir. Flow: boot → settings.setCopilot({ enabled: true, intervalMinutes: 1 }) → seed events (ticket.created, ticket.closed, meeting.created, meeting.ended) via existing IPC fixtures → manual copilot.tick (expose __test__ ipc path ONLY in test mode if not already present) → assert copilot.insights returns ≥ 1 row matching the canned JSON payload → dismiss one insight → verify dismissedAt + audit.list contains `copilot.dismissed` row → copilot.ask run → assert step stream via existing palette harness (data-step-kind selectors) produces plan + tool_call (query_copilot_insights) + answer on the system-copilot thread → assert `data-step-kind='destructive-gate'` ABSENT throughout → assert sidenav shows system-agent AND system-copilot rows distinguishable by name.

Canned fixtures registered via T8's addCopilotFixture (2-3 scripted insight JSON arrays keyed on normalized substrings of the analyzer prompt) + T6's ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY seam in test-agentic-tools.ts (1-2 scripted query_copilot_insights envelopes for the ask path). Fixtures registered in beforeAll + cleared in afterAll with clearCopilotFixtures / clearAgenticFixtures as applicable. No mutation of CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE or CANNED_COPILOT_QUERY_TABLE frozen constants at module-load time.

If a __test__ tick IPC does not exist yet, add one (copilot.__test__.tick or similar) that no-ops in production and calls analyzer.tick(companyId, { reason: 'scheduled' }) in test mode. Gate with the same testMode flag the T4 placeholder uses. Assert production-mode throws clearly.

Full verification gate: 1099/1099 unit tests still passing (T9 adds 0 unit; may need to bump copilot-handlers.test.ts / analyzer tests if the __test__ channel lands — budget absorbed if so); E2E 8/8 → 9/9 spec files (green count reported by Playwright is 9 → 10 if T9 ships 1 case OR 9 → 11 if 2 cases, document which); 0 lint errors; warnings ≤ 34 (baseline 24); typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages.

Atomic test commit: test(m33): M33 T9 — copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip. Follow-up ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T9 — commit ledger (<sha>). Updates current-task to M33-T10, pending.json T9 status → completed + metrics + T9 note, orchestrator.json tasksShipped 9 → 10 + inflight.lastShipped 'T8' → 'T9' + current.e2eSpecs 8 → 9 + current.e2eGreenCount 9 → (9 + T9 case count) + commits.T9 + T9 note.
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-copilot-provider.ts — register 2-3 fixtures via addCopilotFixture calls in spec setup (no source changes unless adding inlineFixtures is cleaner)

apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-agentic-tools.ts — populate CANNED_COPILOT_QUERY_TABLE entries OR use the ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY sentinel in the ask prompt for 1-2 scripted query_copilot_insights envelopes
apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/copilot-handlers.ts — ADD __test__ tick channel if not already present (gated on testMode)
apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/register.ts + packages/shared-types/src/ipc.ts — wire the new __test__ channel if added
apps/desktop/src/preload/api.ts + renderer preload bridge — expose the __test__ tick if needed for the spec
testsDelta: +1 E2E spec (8 → 9 spec files; green count 9 → 10 or 11)
notes: Structural pattern: mirror apps/desktop/e2e/task-planner.spec.ts (M32 T8) + agentic-loop.spec.ts (M31 T8) + command-palette.spec.ts (M30 T8). Same Electron launch harness (real out/main/index.js, throwaway --user-data-dir, NODE_ENV=test). Same palette step-stream harness (data-step-kind selectors, wait-for terminal step kind 'answer'). Same dual-assertion pattern: destructive-gate ABSENT + expected-state PRESENT.

Non-goal: T9 does NOT touch production analyzer code, production provider router, or the RAG indexer. Test seam changes only. If a __test__ IPC channel lands, it MUST throw in non-test mode (mirror copilot.configure's T5 production-throw pattern).

Subagent handoff: ONE subagent pass for canned-script generation (budget per M32 T8 handoff note — additive surface, subagent has M31/M32 canned-script patterns + T8 test-copilot-provider to mirror). Coordinator does git-diff verification + biome spot-check + atomic commit. Do NOT delegate the E2E assertions themselves — those are the correctness contract and belong to the coordinator.

M31/M32 E2E timing envelope: smoke ~2s, ticket-flow ~1.8s, meeting-flow ~3s, agentic-loop ~12s, task-planner ~15s. Budget T9 copilot-service ≤ 20s. If it runs longer, the canned fixtures are mis-keyed (normalized prompt doesn't contain the fixture key — re-verify with a manual `console.log(normalizePrompt(user))` in test-copilot-provider.ts if debugging).

Estimate: 2-3 hour full session. E2E specs are comprehensively harder than unit tests — real Electron boot, real DB migrations, real IPC round-trip, multiple assertions across bus + audit + thread sidenav. T10 follows (docs + verification + milestone marker, ~60 min + ABI rebuild dance).
